name: Tomato Bruschetta w/ Fresh Basil
recipeIngredient: 1 Half loaf French or Italian bread or 1 French baguette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine diced tomatoes, chopped fresh basil, minced garlic, salt, and pepper to taste; let stand for 15 minutes or cover and refrigerate for up to 4 hours.
2. Slice bread into 1"-thick slices. Place on a baking sheet and broil until lightly browned on each side.
3. Rub the cut side of one whole garlic clove over one side of each slice of bread, then brush with olive oil.
4. Spoon the tomato mixture over the top of each slice of bread.
5. Sprinkle with freshly grated parmesan (if using).
6. If the tomato mixture has been refrigerated, broil the bruschetta for 1 minute. Makes about 16 slices.
Source: Lighthearted Everyday Cooking; Anne Lindsay. MM by Lyn.
